title: Simple Apple Trees
description: A datapack that adds Apple Trees which you can find growing across the world.
body:
## Showcase
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/HT9YqJeUA9g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## About the Datapack
**Simple Apple Trees** is a Minecraft datapack that adds Apple Trees that grow all over the Minecraft globe. Chop one down to get a huge amount of apples, or use shears to collect the Fruiting Apple Tree Leaves for your own use!

You can find the list of all features this datapack introduces in the changelog tab.

**Simple Apple Trees** is available in 19 languages:
- English (US, UK and even Upside Down!)
- Spanish (Spain and Mexico)
- Portuguese (Portugal and Brazil)
- Russian
- French
- German
- Italian
- Polish
- Ukrainian
- Chinese (Traditional and Simplified)
- Korean
- Hindi (for 26.1+)
- Arabic (for 26.1+)
- Swedish (for 26.1+)

## FAQ

**Q:** How can I disable the "Loaded succesfully!" message?
> **A:** Add the [No HFD Load Popups](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-hfd-popups) datapack to your datapack/mod folder.

**Q:** Will you backport the datapack to an older version such as 1.XX?
> **A:** I can not reliably backport the datapack to versions lower than 1.20.2 because it uses the [/random](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Commands/random) command, which was added in 1.20.2. If you're looking for a pack for versions older than 1.20.2, or for one that works without a resourcepack, I recommend [Apple Trees by Gamemode 4](https://modrinth.com/datapack/gm4-apple-trees) and [Fruitful by mega7](https://modrinth.com/datapack/fruitful-trees). Both of them are great packs, so check them out!

**Q:** The pack doesn't work! / I don't see the "datapack loaded succesfully!" message!
> **A:** You have either downloaded the wrong version of the datapack, or you're on a Minecraft version that doesn't support it.

**Q:** The Apple Trees are broken and I don't get apples!
> **A:** You're using the datapack on an unsupported version of Minecraft. Check the versions tab for supported versions.

**Q:** The datapack works, but the Fruiting Apple Leaves look like Azalea leaves or have missing textures!
> **A:** You forgot to download the resourcepack. You can find it in the versions tab.

**Q:** I have multiple Fruiting Apple Tree Leaves blocks that won't stack together!
> **A:** You have used the pack on an older version of the game, and then changed your Minecraft version. You can place all blocks down and collect them again with shears to update their data.

# Additional Info

Using this pack in a video or modpack is fine as long as proper credit is given.

If you wish to contact me you can do so via Gmail (happyfiedyt@gmail.com), Discord (@happyfied), or the [happyfied Modrinth Feedback Form](https://forms.gle/WRtN3YQVyJuZWpuN7).

Bugs wanted.
